International Relations Graduate & Global Storyteller

Shaping Narratives
That Drive
Global Change

Bridging law, diplomacy, and storytelling to advocate for peace, quality education, and strong partnerships. Advancing SDGs 16, 4, and 17 through research-backed insights and compelling narratives.

My Story

From Law to Diplomacy: A Journey of Purpose

For as long as I can remember, I dreamed of becoming a lawyer—someone who uses knowledge, reasoning, and advocacy to create justice and shape systems that matter. Along the way, I discovered another calling: the world of diplomacy, international relations, and storytelling.

I realized that the law doesn't just exist in courtrooms; it lives in policies, narratives, and the ways we communicate ideas that can change lives. Now, as a fresh International Relations graduate from Anchor University, Lagos, I aim to bridge these worlds.

Whether I'm writing a policy paper, delivering a speech, or creating digital content, I show up with research-backed insights, clarity, and heart. I want to inspire confidence, spark meaningful conversations, and help people and institutions see the power of their stories.

Academic Excellence
01

Peace & Justice (SDG 16)

Advocating for strong institutions, justice systems, and peaceful societies through research, policy analysis, and strategic communication that drives institutional reform and conflict resolution.

02

Quality Education (SDG 4)

Championing inclusive, equitable education initiatives and lifelong learning opportunities that empower youth and communities to shape their futures and contribute to global development.

03

Global Partnerships (SDG 17)

Building bridges between stakeholders, organizations, and nations to foster collaboration, knowledge sharing, and collective action toward achieving sustainable development goals.

04

Diplomatic Storytelling

Crafting compelling narratives that communicate complex international affairs, policy positions, and humanitarian causes with clarity, empathy, and impact to diverse global audiences.

05

Content Strategy & Advocacy

Developing research-backed content and social media strategies that amplify organizational missions, engage stakeholders, and drive meaningful conversations around global challenges.

06

Youth Leadership & Representation

Empowering young voices in international forums, Model UN panels, and global conferences while advocating for youth inclusion in decision-making processes.

Achievements & Recognition

Featured Work & Honors

Global Representation

Germany's Untold Stories
& WWII Narratives

Represented Nigeria at HISTOCON Germany, engaging directly with the German President to illuminate overlooked historical perspectives from World War II. This experience reinforced my commitment to ensuring diverse voices shape our understanding of global history.

In Action

HISTOCON Germany 2023: Engaging with Global Leaders

80 Years On: Young Perspectives on the Global Impact of WWII

Presenting research at an international history conference, supported by the German Federal Foreign Office

Meeting German President Steinmeier

Discussing untold WWII narratives and youth perspectives on global history

Representing Nigeria at HISTOCON

International history conference in Berlin, Germany

Young Perspectives on Global Impact

Presenting research on WWII's lasting global effects

Engaging with Historical Narratives

Exploring diverse perspectives at the conference exhibition

"This experience at HISTOCON Germany reinforced my belief that diverse voices must shape our understanding of global history. Engaging with world leaders like President Steinmeier showed me the power of youth perspectives in international dialogue."

— Oluwaseun Akinola, Nigerian Delegate
